sections.paragraph: only in plur. ֹות Num 15:20, 21 Num 15:21 Neh 10:38 Eze 44:30 coarse meal, polenta (Gries, Grüße) comp. Talmud ערסן polenta made from barley, pearl barley. Syriac ܣܳܢܳܐ id. [see Thes.], also a drink made of it. Root עָרַס which see. LXX., Vulg., Num., φύραμα, pulmentum. Neh., Eze. σῖτος, cibus.
